name: aiter-fp8-blockscale-stream-dispatch
description: FP8 block-scale GEMM kernel launches on default HIP stream instead of caller's stream, causing data races and incorrect output under overlap scheduling
task_description_source: GitHub issue sgl-project/sglang#21566 (symptom only, no fix details)

version_pins.note: Bug is nullptr passed to stream_config in CK-tile blockscale GEMM kernel launch. Base image has the bug; fix was merged in aiter PR#2520 after this image.
